holdings.infoBox: QRMI is an equity ETF with a total of 107 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.55%, Apple at 7.21%, Micron Technology at 5.59%, Microsoft at 4.91%, and Amazon.com at 4.37%.

overview.description: The Global X NASDAQ 100 Risk Managed Income ETF (QRMI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index that holds NASDAQ 100 stocks while employing an options collar strategy. The fund buys 5% OTM put options and sells ATM covered call options on a monthly basis. QRMI was launched on Aug 25, 2021 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: NASDAQ-100 Monthly Net Credit Collar 95-100 Index
